title: Turkish Mod
description: The portal includes additions such as Türkiye portal, Ankara portal,Vergi dimmession, kebab, tea, Okaner, mosque imam, Turkish uncle, etc.
body:
![TURKISH MOD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/910f5edc64925c02e15e4aa600d350251ab5ebeb_0.webp)

Update 1.5.0 is out! This update adds a new dimension and a new boss to the game! Enjoy.

1.5.0 güncellemesi çıktı! BU güncellemede oyuna yeni bir boyut ve yeni bir boss eklendi! Tadını çıkarın.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/d9lskcyVAFs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FYFKRrglIvs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>Turkish mod ÇIKTI, BU MOD BAZI TÜRK YEMEKLERİNİ, PORTALLARINI, BAZI MİZAHLARI, BAZI MOBLARI EKLER.GELİŞTİRİLME AŞAMASINDADIR DESTEK VERİRSENİZ SEVİNİRİM.♡(Version 1.1.0 is out! This mod adds some Turkish dishes, portals, some humor, and some mobs. It's still under development, so your support would be appreciated. ♡)
